creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #1)

Confusing: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/using-java.html says I can, make java-debug. How am I, as a port maintainer, supposed to know what I can set? Yes, how am I supposed to test with various versions if I cannot set it? This is somewhat disappointing.
